ead.archdesc:
======= RMM07041Gustav Edward Kappler papers7041Compiled by Nancy DeanDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 20012B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
vnwar lifesThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:01:20 UTC.ENG12/07/2018

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Gustav Edward Kappler papers
Kappler, Gustav Edward, 1940-
Vietnam War Veterans Archives
7041
.8 cubic feet. .8 cubic feet.
23 audiocassettes. 23 audiocassettes.
1951-2014. Collection material in English Collection of color slides, tape recordings and transcripts describing the vascular surgeon's experiences during the Vietnam War. Photographs, manuscripts, audio recordings, ephemera. 2075386
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Gustav Kappler, Cornell University Class of 1961, M.D. 1965, was a vascular surgeon during the Vietnam War.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes color slides, with a tape recording and transcript describing the slides, 1984; also a DVD of a presentation by Dr. Kappler and David Leeser given at Weill Auditorium on February 13, 2012 and a DVD with a Powerpoint presentation of the slides. Also tapes sent home, telegrams, and correspondence, 1970-1984; photograph album; Vietnamese currency and other memorabilia; and manuscript draft for article.
Booklet compiled for the 2008 Reunion of staff from the Phu Bai/85th Evacuation Hospital, 1971/72, with information about their later lives. Folder of materials from the 2010 Reunion, including updates on their lives, CDs with photographs and songs, and information about Hilton Head.
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Nancy Dean
Date completed:
April 1990
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez July 2001
Date modified:
Jude Corina, October 2014
Restrictions on Use:
Publication of written, pictorial, or recorded material requires the permission of donor.
Conditions Governing Use
Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual material that has been digitized: TR-5176-5177
Cite As:
Gustav Edward Kappler Papers, #7041. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SERIES LIST
Series I. General Items
Box 1-4
Series II. Tape Recordings
tr. 4538 to tr. 4544; tr. 5173 to tr. 5178; tr. 5179a to tr. 5184a
Series III. DVD's, CD's
Box 1: DVD-798, DVD-1150 & 1151 CD-418, CD-1643 & 1644
Telegrams. Color slides. Photographs. Money. Vietnam. Surgeons. Vietam War, 1961-1975 -- Veterans -- United States -- Biography. Vietnam War, 1961-1975.
